phase-plan.purpose: Implement runtime delivery APIs for content-pack artifact publish/pull using Supabase S3-compatible storage, versioned indexing, and signed URL retrieval for Unreal plugin consumption.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: API contracts, object-key/version indexing policy, signed URL endpoints, publish/pull request/response schema, basic telemetry fields. Out of scope: full plugin runtime implementation and Dolt governance policies (phase 53).

file.description: Runtime API surface for content-pack operations.
User-facing delivery workflow docs aligned with API behavior.

task.description: Define and implement publish route contract for uploading versioned artifact bundles and writing manifest index metadata.
Define and implement pull route contract for index lookup + signed URL retrieval by requested version/runtime/plugin compatibility.
Add contract tests and docs examples for publish/pull lifecycle and failure modes.

questions.question: Will publish endpoints be restricted to internal CI/service accounts only, or also admin UI users?
Should pull endpoint enforce compatibility filtering server-side or return candidate versions with client-side selection?

decision.summary: Phase 52-03 focuses on distribution contracts and API behavior, not Dolt branch governance.
decision.impact: Keeps implementation bounded and aligned with production delivery needs.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement text yet defines publish/pull API contract shape for runtime artifact delivery.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for version-indexed publish/pull APIs with signed URL retrieval and compatibility filter semantics.
